narrative:
Loudon (precinct in Carroll County) has 590 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.7 percentage points.
